Rubicite Breastplate  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 19
HP Regen +3
WT: 6.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Rubicite Breastplate
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 19
HP Regen +3
WT: 6.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):155, 15, 15
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1276
Submitted By:Koreldyre
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 05:13:28
Page Updated:Fri Apr 13th, 2018

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 27,500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
King's Court Casino

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Cazic-Thule: Lost Temple of Cazic-Thule (Level 85 - Hardcore HH)
NPC Name
a diseased mosquito - Cazic-Thule 2.0 - HH
a frenzied alligator
a graystriped mosquito
a hulking gorilla
a lifestealer mosquito
a lizard broodling
a lizard champion
a lizard crusader
a lizard defender
a lizard disciple
a lizard fanatic
a lizard guard
a lizard herald
a lizard judicator
a lizard justicar
a lizard page
a lizard probationer
a lizard proselyte
a lizard protector
a lizard ritualist
a lizard sentinel
a lizard warder
a lizard warrior
a lizard zealot
a silvered guard
a virulent mosquito - Cazic-Thule 2.0 - HH
an alligator - Cazic-Thule 2.0 - HH
Avatar of Fear
Cazic Cenobite
Dismay
Radiant - Cazic-Thule 2.0 - HH
Soul Siphon
Tae Ew Agressor
Tae Ew Archon
Tae Ew Bloodfiend
Tae Ew Convert
Tae Ew Diviner
Tae Ew Templar
Tae Ew Trapper
Tae Ew Warlord
Thul Tae Ew Crusader
Thul Tae Ew Ritualist
Thul Tae Ew Torturer


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Cazic-Thule: Lost Temple of Cazic-Thule (Level 85 - Hardcore HH)
Shadow Haven
This was dropped by the Avatar of Fear in the original Cazic Thule zone; replaced by the class specific quest armor. It is highly coveted for it's effect of regeneration.

It's now a reward from the Shadow Haven casino as well as a drop in the special "Hardcore Heritage" version of Cazic Thule.


Uploaded February 27th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction

Dropping now on TLP
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2016 at 4:38 PM Rating: Good
Melyodas
13 posts
Currently dropping on Phinigel TLP server.

Obviously the BP drops off the AoF. Does anyone know what mobs drop the other pieces? No info about this anywhere.
▲ Page top
Dropping now on TLP
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2016 at 6:26 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Melyodas wrote:
Currently dropping on Phinigel TLP server.

Obviously the BP drops off the AoF. Does anyone know what mobs drop the other pieces? No info about this anywhere.



Possibly following this clue:

Tarwen wrote:
For the trivia-minded, these were originally dropped by the Avatar of Fear in Cazic Thule (long before the CT revamp).

Rubicite armor drops were removed from the game (replaced by Ravenscale drops) in the October 13th, 1999 patch (the same patch that moved the Journeyman's Boots off of Drelzna).



So we might be able to assume whatever currently drops Ravenscale (but they may have changed a lot of the NPC when CT was upped from a newbie dungeon). At the very least it was all from the zone by the sounds of it so kill it all and let us know!

Collector Item
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2009 at 3:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1659313181242
Sage
136 posts
No it was once usable by Monks.. I used to have screenshot of a Monk doing flying kick wearing full suit.. This was before it was removed from Cazic Thule.. way before Kunark... So yes it was usable by Monks.. not sure if all/all but monk was wearable..
▲ Page top
This item is still worth it for some
QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2008 at 7:29 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Regen items are still expensive or hard to come by for lower level players. This BP was the shiznit back in the day and you had to have a really good group to camp it. Before the Sol Ro armors were introduced, this item was always overcamped and kill stealing and ninja looting were common. It was really unpleasant trying to get one of these. It may be trash to you if you already have better, but you can probably sell it within minutes for a good price if you put it on your bazaar mule.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
used to be....
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2007 at 8:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591946412330
3 posts
used to be OK back in the day ...now its just a ****** item u hope not to get form the C.
▲ Page top
used to be....
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2008 at 7:40 AM Rating: Decent
Reyla
Scholar
1,074 posts
Nothing personal but you did not play Everquest "Back in the day" if you think so. This camp most likely invented the word "Kill Steal". This one or Drelzna when she droppe Jboots.

People would literally stand around the lizard spawn point and go full DPS on it as soon as it popped. Wizards were usually the ones getting the kill shot.
____________________________
After 16 years, I'm not listing every friggin character.

Just wpn
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 1:51 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1606090711584
128 posts
Yahooo just won this in King's Court Casino.
Gold ticket baby Yeah :-)

These are now fitted for Berzerkers as well :-)

Edited, Tue Sep 21 00:57:11 2004
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 27 2004 at 3:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Every other gold ticket item in the casino is huge. They either sell very well or serve a great function. Why is it that they always have to put a piece of **** item in such a great thing, like the casino? Where people can spend 50K+ plat for a chance at the gold ticket. Once aquired they look forward to the possibility of holgrish elder beads, or a scimitar, but no, they gotta throw in this breastplate thats worth 10k max. Hell its not usefull, the iksar bp is better for the regen. So why did this show up in the casino? Because the guy in charge of making the casino was too busy sucking a fat **** to realize he accidentally added this instead of something better. Woops, their bad.
Casino can kiss my ***
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2016 at 12:31 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
It's in there for nostalgia purposes. A lot of people wanted one of these, but were never able to get it before it was removed from the game. Putting it in casino gives them a chance to have not only this, but also a few other items that may no longer drop anymore that were considered desirable in the beginning.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Casino can kiss my ass
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 7:12 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1606090711584
128 posts
Naw... it is still worth it for those of you that actually look for collector's items. This is one of them. Imagine a cleric with chloroplast and the rubicite breastplate ... using a manastone to get mana back. those of us who saw them in use before Kunark know what I mean. this item is still a good item. No matter how you look at it +3 regen for a lowbie training up to 30 or 40 is killer. You could find better yes... if you want to shell out the money for it. it is also helpful for shaman who are cannibalizing for mana. it is still a good item. Just not as good as others. Much like Ton Po's or Gauntlets of Infuse or Holgresh beads. Each of these items are good and are helpful. There are better in the game... but they are still helpful. Said my piece ... hope this helps broaden your mind.

This dropped just a few days ago at a GM event in Everfrost. Tons of ice giants were spanwed outside Permafrost Keep and they were randomly droppin Rubi. We got like a full suit and I won the BP. My bard will love it =)

For the trivia-minded...
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 4:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965793209
Scholar
115 posts
For the trivia-minded, these were originally dropped by the Avatar of Fear in Cazic Thule (long before the CT revamp).

Rubicite armor drops were removed from the game (replaced by Ravenscale drops) in the October 13th, 1999 patch (the same patch that moved the Journeyman's Boots off of Drelzna).
▲ Page top
RE: For the trivia-minded...
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2003 at 7:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752538177
View User Forum
186 posts
I was so upset cause I was 2nd on the list for Drelzna when the servers came down for patch. I was SOOO close to getting my jboots
▲ Page top
Finally got one
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2003 at 8:36 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965793209
Scholar
115 posts
This item has been my holy grail since I began playing EQ in the summer of 1999, and last night I finally aquired one.

The seller was initially asking 19k, but I ended up getting him down to taking an iksar regen bp and 8500pp for it. Some would say that the item wasn't worth what I gave for it, and based on stats, obviously it wasn't. Others would tell me that even the color isn't unique anymore now that /bodytint is in-game (rubicite is R155, G15, B15, by the way :P), and that's true, too. So why'd I get it? For the same reason a vintage car collector buys a Ford Model-A. You wouldn't buy a Model-A because it's fast or has all the latest features. You'd buy it because it's a Model-A. Same thing applies here.
▲ Page top
Finally got ANOTHER one :)
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 1:27 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965793209
Scholar
115 posts
Well, strange as it may seem, I just got a second rubicite breastplate, less than a week after I got the first one. Got a terrific deal on this one, too. I traded a pair of Golden Efreeti Boots (running 2.5kpp on AB right now), a Tantor's Tusk (anywhere from 1kpp to 2.5kpp), and 1kpp cash for it.

All in all, I'm happy. Two rubicite breastplates in one week. Heck, yeah!
▲ Page top
#animekenji, Posted: Feb 11 2003 at 11:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Iksar Ceremonial BP goes for around 5k and Fungi Tunic goes for around 50k. Iksar BP has same AC but greater regen rate. Rubicite BP should probably be down in the 2-3K range by now.
Collector
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2002 at 4:24 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766592959
55 posts
I have one of these on my Warrior and have had for about 2 yrs. I have thought about selling it, but it's kind of nice to have an item that not many people have right now.

Kind of like the fact of owning one of those hard to find, one-of-a-kind items.

I have seen them being auctioned in the Bazaar on Povar for 50k. Don't know if it got sold for that price or not.

memories
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 4:58 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591771508689
11 posts
i remember seeing one of my shaman buds walking out of cazic with his new rubi BP and i swore that someday i'd get one. took awhile, but i finally did and it is my prize possession.

i have people ask what is really worth...to me priceless. nothing tops the red skull look it has on an ogre warrior and it doesnt drop anymore...priceless

# Feb 13 2003 at 5:29 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772738273
77 posts
hey, if an item is old/rare enough, people will see fit to collect it for obscene prices. like the manastone, pre-nerf CoS, pre-nerf GotD... granted those have a bit more useful effects, but =P.
▲ Page top
RE: Mith Marr
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2003 at 5:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758371020
Scholar
17 posts
/agree

People will pay large sums of cash for items that no longer drop in the game merely for that fact. The more useful the item, the higher the value, but even items of lesser use are still quite expensive.
▲ Page top
Goes to show ya-Check boards!
QuoteReply
# May 30 2002 at 2:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770849382
19 posts
Goes to show ya-Check the boards to know what equipment is what. This recently Dropped on StormHammer Server on a GM event off of Doog the Little HG in EK I had it and nobody wanted it-some guys said he could use it for his Pally so I gave it to him-I had NO idea it even had regen properties (didn't know what rubicite Aura was)-I am now kicking myself in the buttocks for letting this go--goes to show yajust because the BP you are wearing has more AC doesn't mean it is the best!

but i think it may be the only one possibly a few more rotting in a bank but shame on them if it is its a nice looking piece with luclin.
i've wanted this for 2 years now i have it, im happy =)

#REDACTED, Posted: May 19 2002 at 2:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) BP goes for 3k or so on Tunare server. Considering Ceremonial Iksar Chestplate gives 1 more regen per tick, is much easier to find, and is only about 2k more than this, I Don't see why anyone would search for this breastplate and pay big bucks for it unless for some reason they just wanted a full set of ruby. =)
